calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (4-Unit Apartment Building At 17709 Sunset Way, Sonoma, Ca 95476)
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-00-273094 Estate of Barbarina Baker
PTR-18-301739 Barbarina Baker GST Non-Exempt Testamentary Trust
PTR-18-301740 Barbarina Baker GST Exempt Testamentary Trust

Appearances: Dennis Vann

The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property in the Estate matter is Off Calendar. The Exempt Trust owns 84.9509% of the property. The Non-Exempt Trust owns 15.0491% of the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $850,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Additional bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Leslie Gomez. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (5-Unit Apartment Building At 60 Waterman Avenue, Sonoma, Ca 95476)
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-00-273094 Estate of Barbarina Baker
PTR-18-301739 In the Matter of the Barbarina Baker GST Non-Exempt Testamentary Trust
PTR-18-301740 In the Matter of the Barbarina Baker GST Exempt Testamentary Trust

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Linda Harrington

The Court noted that the Buyer and the Bond Agent are present. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property in the Estate matter is Off Calendar. The Exempt Trust owns 84.9509% of the property. The Non-Exempt Trust owns 15.0491% of the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $905,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Additional bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (4-Unit Apartment Building At 17709 Sunset Way, Sonoma, Ca 95476)
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Apr-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Linda Harrington.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is continued to April 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (5-Unit Apartment Building At 60 Waterman Avenue, Sonoma, Ca 95476)
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To Apr-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Linda Harrington (Trustee)

The Court noted that there are two Trusts involved, therefore there should be two separate report of sale and petitions to confirm sale of real property (85% interest in one Trust and 15% interest in the other Trust). Mr. Vann stated there was another property confirmed for sale in 2014 in the same situation. Ms. Harrington stated that there is only one Trust established under the Will and a second Trust was constructed to help the beneficiaries save on taxes/generation skipping transfer tax. In addition, Ms. Harrington stated that she has retired as a professional fiduciary, but stayed on as Trustee in this case, the designated Trustee declined to serve, that all of the beneficiaries nominated her, she has always served in an individual capacity, and that she was appointed in 2002 prior to the Professional Fiduciary Statute. Ms. Harrington also stated that waivers have been signed by 3 beneficiaries and that Anthony the father of the beneficiaries predeceased the decedent. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (5-Unit Apartment Building at 60 Waterman Avenue, Sonoma, CA 95476) is continued to April 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (17715 Sunset Way, Sonoma Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Linda Harrington.

Mr. Vann presented an endorsed copy of a withdrawal of the Request for Special Notice from Richard Spotswood. The sale was confirmed at $175,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $167,000.00 is required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
